title: rubus × launayi
intro: Rubus × launayi, also known as the hybrid raspberry or wild raspberry, is a plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family, resulting from a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthocyanin-rich berries, which possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × launayi include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
